channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How the world can tackle the power demands of artificial intelligence
item.description: The world must reshape its technology infrastructure to ensure artificial intelligence makes good on its potential as a transformative moment in digital innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google introduces PaliGemma 2 vision-language AI models
item.description: Google has introduced a new family of PaliGemma vision-language models, offering scalable performance, long captioning, and support for specialized tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joby Aviation receives FAA approval for flight academy
item.description: Joby Aviation, the Santa Cruz-based company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, has received certification for its pilot training, in addition to having its voluntary safety management system accepted.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US officials tout encryption apps amid Salt Typhoon cyberattack
item.description: Federal officials are calling on telecommunication companies to boost national security by using encrypted messaging apps following an unprecedented Chinese hacking campaign against more than half a dozen telecom firms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Malicious Play Store apps put 8 million Android users at risk
item.description: It's easy to download malicious apps if you're not careful, and a new report reveals more than a dozen malicious apps with SpyLoan malware have been available at the Play Store.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta quietly leans on rival GPT-4 despite Zuckerberg’s bold Llama claims
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has consistently championed Meta’s Llama AI model as a leader in generative AI technology, positioning it as a strong competitor to OpenAI and Google. However, behind the scenes, Meta is complementing Llama with a rival AI model to meet its internal needs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Hands on with Microsoft’s Windows Recall: Not impressive yet
item.description: When Microsoft announced Recall earlier this year, the move took the tech world by storm — and not in a good way. Recall is supposed to help you find almost anything you see on your PC by taking screenshots in the background and turning your everyday Windows usage into a searchable database.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Heroku PaaS adds .NET support
item.description: Meeting a longstanding request from users, Salesforce’s Heroku — one of the original platforms as a service (PaaS) — has unveiled official support for .NET development. Heroku also made its Heroku Next Generation Platform available in a pilot.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OMB touts progress on improper payments amid anti-fraud push
item.description: Agencies say workforce training and data sharing are key to combatting fraud after the governmentwide improper payments rate dipped to 3.97% in fiscal 2024. The post OMB touts progress on improper payments amid anti-fraud push first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024
item.description: Join host Luke McCormack as he discusses 2024 federal IT successes with top government and industry technology experts. The post Federal Executive Forum Profiles in Excellence in Government: CIO Achievements 2024 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Open-washing and the illusion of AI openness
item.description: A peculiar trend has taken hold within the AI gold rush: Major players in the space—from OpenAI to Google and Microsoft—have started to heavily market their AI models as “open.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Rust 1.83 expands const capabilities
item.description: The Rust Team has released Rust 1.83, an update to the memory-safe and thread-safe programming language that brings expanded capabilities for code running in const contexts.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Red Hat Ansible service comes to AWS Marketplace
item.description: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform Service, for automating the management of hybrid cloud infrastructure, now is available as a managed offering on Amazon Web Services through the AWS Marketplace. General availability of Red Hat’s automation service was announced December 2.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AWS PartyRock updated with free daily usage for developers
item.description: Amazon Web Services has updated AWS PartyRock, its mostly free low code tool for building generative AI applications with a new app search function and the ability to build document processing into applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AWS’ Amazon Connect service gets new-gen AI updates
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Amazon Connect contact center service to help enterprises offer a better end-to-end customer experience, the company announced at its ongoing annual re:Invent conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 9 ways scammers can use your phone number to try to trick you
item.description: Scammers can wreak havoc on your life just by having your phone number. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson addresses how to avoid becoming a victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
